case_title: UNIFUND CCR, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. EVA M. ALLRED et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLRED, EVA HEARING SET FOR MAY-08-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-08-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT EVA ALLRED'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE.
